description_long: This armchair features a modern, boxy silhouette with thick, horizontally segmented cushions that create a plush and inviting appearance. The upholstery is a smooth, light gray fabric, complemented by a single, slightly darker gray throw pillow for added comfort and style. The armrests are wide and fully padded, matching the seat and backrest in both material and design, providing a cohesive look. The chair sits on slender, gold-colored metal legs that elevate it slightly off the ground, adding a touch of elegance and contemporary flair. The backrest is medium height and straight, offering ample support while maintaining a clean, minimalist profile. Overall, the armchair exudes a sense of comfort and sophistication, making it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, light gray upholstered armchair with thick, segmented cushions, wide padded armrests, and slender gold metal legs. Includes a contrasting gray throw pillow for added comfort and style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, segmented armrest and the plush throw pillow resting against the backrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, padded armrests, and the centrally placed throw pillow.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion design, with the pillow partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth, unsegmented back panel and the tops of the armrests and pillow.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, padded, and fully upholstered in fabric
attribute_backrest_style: medium height, straight, segmented and padded
